Fixture 5: Post-STOP Recovery with Human Directive
- Scenario: Resume after STOP, human directive priority override
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "./prd.md", 2) with LOKI_HUMAN_INPUT set
- Expected Behavior: Human directive injected at PRIORITY level
- Key Variables:
  - human_directive: "HUMAN_DIRECTIVE (PRIORITY): URGENT: Fix critical security issue..."
  - human_directive appears before queue_tasks in dynamic context
- Test: Verify human_directive appears and comes before other dynamic contexts
